sections.paragraph:
-

(1) prop. a scab, rough place left on the skin from a healed ulcer, Levit. 13:23 or from burning, verse 28 Pro 16:28 cicatrix, as rightly rendered by LXX., Vulg., Chald. See the root No. 1. Others would derive this from Arab. ضرب to strike.

(2) adj. fem. burning (used of fire), Pro 16:27 [see above].
